name: Pfizer Limited
summary: Pfizer Limited manufactures, markets, trades in, and exports pharmaceutical products in India and internationally. It offers its various products in various therapeutic areas, including anti-allergic, anti-diabetic, antihistamine, anti-infective, anti-parasitic, cardiovascular, dermatology, erectile dysfunction, neurology, pain/fever/inflammation, pediatrics, psychiatry, respiratory, urology, women's health, central nervous system, autoimmune disorders, and gastrointestinal. The company also provides multivitamins, vitamins/minerals, antibiotics, steroids, vaccines, and consumer healthcare products. It sells its products through a network of independent distributors primarily under the Minipress XL, Folvite, Magnex, Eliquis, Gelusil, Lyrica, Ovral L, Citralka, Prevenar 13, Autrin, Zavicefta, Wysolone, Xeljanz, Corex, Mucaine, Becosules, Ativan, Neksium, Meronem, And Dolonex brand names. Pfizer Limited has a strategic partnership with GlobalSpace Technologies Limited to leverage the Makebot platform for vaccine awareness and DocExa platform for consultation by specialists. The company was incorporated in 1950 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
